name: ImageGen
description: Batch-generate images through your own logged-in ChatGPT, on your normal quota. Real session, images render, auto-named downloads. (1.8.1: Activity now shows a live Codex lane — what it's generating on the separate quota and how far. 1.8.0: codex images sync into the panel as previews; never overwrite — every regenerate writes a new version (run-N-v2, v3...), panel shows the latest.)
